defaults.title: Strike Burst
defaults.subtitle: Close Combat
defaults.skillText: Quick strike deals fast frontline damage.
defaults.ultimateText: Combo Overflow: double-hit rush through the center lane.

defaults.title: Barrier Pulse
defaults.subtitle: Frontline Hold
defaults.skillText: Barrier stance cuts incoming burst pressure.
defaults.ultimateText: Pulse Fortress: converts guard into a full team wall.

defaults.title: Support Surge
defaults.subtitle: Ki Relay
defaults.skillText: Relay surge boosts the next card attack.
defaults.ultimateText: Ki Relay Storm: floods the board with amplified energy.

cards.title: Tiger Rush
cards.subtitle: Dojo Break
cards.skillText: Tiger Rush tears open the first lane with fast pressure.
cards.ultimateText: Dojo Cataclysm: chained rush combo shatters enemy defense.

cards.title: Iron Counter
cards.subtitle: Heavy Guard
cards.skillText: Iron Counter punishes heavy attacks with reflected force.
cards.ultimateText: Steel Mirror: every hit turns into a crushing counter wave.

cards.title: Dragon Focus
cards.subtitle: Spirit Charge
cards.skillText: Dragon Focus channels spirit charge into every ally.
cards.ultimateText: Heaven Splitter: total field buff and finishing dragon burst.

cards.title: Azure Fang
cards.subtitle: Awakened Rush
cards.skillText: Azure Fang rips through the lane with awakened combo pressure.
cards.ultimateText: Skybreaker Blitz: awakened rush detonates through every opening.

cards.title: Dragon Ascendant
cards.subtitle: Awakened Spirit
cards.skillText: Dragon Ascendant floods the team with awakened ki and boost.
cards.ultimateText: Celestial Splitter: ascended aura overwhelms the whole board.

cards.title: Death Beam
cards.subtitle: Precision Kill
cards.skillText: Death Beam pierces the lane with surgical burst damage.
cards.ultimateText: Execution Ray: precision fire that deletes weakened targets.

cards.title: Emperor Shield
cards.subtitle: Cold Armor
cards.skillText: Emperor Shield creates a cold barrier against assaults.
cards.ultimateText: Tyrant Guard: freezes momentum and locks the whole front.

cards.title: Void Tyrant
cards.subtitle: Malice Engine
cards.skillText: Void Tyrant turns malice into total board control.
cards.ultimateText: Absolute Dominion: overwhelming aura crushes every lane at once.

cards.title: Emperor Ray
cards.subtitle: Awakened Beam
cards.skillText: Emperor Ray carves through shields with awakened precision fire.
cards.ultimateText: Final Execution: awakened beam erases weakened targets outright.

cards.title: Golden Tyrant
cards.subtitle: Awakened Core
cards.skillText: Golden Tyrant converts domination into brutal teamwide pressure.
cards.ultimateText: Absolute Ruin: awakened malice crushes the entire grid.
